items.title: Quick takeaways…
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Quick takeaways…

1) Totally reasonable deal for both sides. I like the Hawks avoiding the downside risk of a multi-year commitment.

2) This very likely ensures the Hawks will operate as an over-the-cap team.

items.title: Bonus Hollander POTD Darrell Armstrong. Undrafted in 91 + spent years in minors before getting PT in 96 w/ORL at age 28. Sparkplug off bench, won 6th Man in 98-99. Used to drink sugary coffee before game to be really ready. Peaked at 16 ppg 7 apg. Retired in 2009 at age 39.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Bonus Hollander POTD Darrell Armstrong. Undrafted in 91 + spent years in minors before getting PT in 96 w/ORL at age 28. Sparkplug off bench, won 6th Man in 98-99. Used to drink sugary coffee before game to be really ready. Peaked at 16 ppg 7 apg. Retired in 2009 at age 39.
